title: Learn to Run Before Flying
html:
Learn to Run Before Flying

A self-coined sequencing rule from April 2021 (2021 04 27 crypto internship earning): the title of the note that bundles python code learning, crypto trading lessons, eTrade account, karate with dad under the umbrella "Crypto internship / earning job (learning to run before flying)". The phrase upgrades the cliché walk before you run into a more aggressive frame — running is already the assumed baseline; the hubris being checked is flight, not motion.

In context: Yahir is 18, COVID-era, post-pandemic-future-thinking ramping up, sees the crypto window opening (this is the SafeMoon-era note), and is explicitly self-coaching against premature ambition. The python course, the eTrade account, and the earning-job framing are all preparatory — building the runway to do the more ambitious thing later, not the ambitious thing now.

Pairs cleanly with no runway discipline (the 2025-2026 version of the same instinct under harsher constraints) and bridge income strategies (the structural form).

Connections

no runway discipline · bridge income strategies · post pandemic future thinking · disconnected from outcome · value proposition as distinction
